h1.visual_description: Largest font size, bold, serif typeface, used for primary activity titles at the top of the page.

h2.visual_description: Medium-large font size, bold, serif typeface, used for major section headings within an activity.

h3.visual_description: Bold, serif typeface, slightly larger than body text, specifically used for table captions.
h3.example_text: Table 13.4. Typical CEC of various soil colloids.

visual_matchers.pattern: Small shovel icon (glyph) preceding a block of text
Centered block containing multi-part fractions, units, and equals signs

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Emphasis or technical terms (e.g., 'that is', 'in nature')

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX block math ($$ ... $$) for complex multi-line equations with units
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Internal cross-references to numbered tables (e.g., Table 13.4)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Footer text containing page number and chapter title separated by a pipe (e.g., '120 | Soil Colloids')
